rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH O1, 2007, LINE 8. PLAINTIFF NANCY MACHADO'S MOTION For Leave To File First Amended Complaint IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: CLIFFORD PARR VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS,B*P, AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH O1, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT ELEMENTS CHEMICALS, INC.'S, FORMERLY KNOWN AS HARCROS CHEMICALS, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. SEE SCHEIDING AND UNITED COMMUNITY CHURCH. EVEN IF DEFENDANT MET ITS BURDEN, PLAINTIFF HAS DEMONSTRATED THAT THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT, INCLUDING HAMILTON'S USE OF UNION CARBIDE ASBESTOS FIBERS, PLAINTIFF'S USE OF HAMILTON JOINT COMPOUND AND WHETHER DEFENDANT WAS THE EXCLUSIVE DISTRIBUTOR. MOTION IS ONLY FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, NOT SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT NEED NOT RULE ON THE FALSE REPRESENTATION CLAIM. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA DOBASHI VS. STEPHEN GOLDSTEIN et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH O1, 2007, LINE 10. DEFENDANT R. GOLDSTEIN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT: DENY DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE PARAGRAPHS I.T.-1.4, GRANT DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE FOLLOWING PROVISIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT: PARAGRAPH I.T.-7 THAT READS: "IN AN EFFORT TO RE-ESTABLISH THE RELATIONSHIP WITH PLAINTIFF" AND "IN A FURTHER EFFORT TO RE-ESTABLISH THE RELATIONSHIP." PARAGRAPH I.T.-8 THAT READS; "AND DID RE-ESTABLISH HER RELATIONSHIP WITH HIM." PARAGRAPH I.T.-9 THAT READS: "TO RE-ESTABLISH HER RELATIONSHIP WITH GOLDSTEIN." F.R.-2.a.3 "GOLDSTEIN REPRESENTATED THAT HE HAD NO RELATIONSHIP WITH OSUNA AS OF OCTOBER 1, 2004." F.R.2b.2 "GOLDSTEIN HAD AN ONGOING RELATIONSHIP WITH OSUNA OF SOME TYPE." F.R.-4.a.2 "GOLDSTEIN MAINTAINED SOME TYPE OF RELATIONSHIP WITH OSUNA." F.R.-5.2 "PLAINTIFF RE-ESTABLISHED HER RELATIONSHIP WITH GOLDSTEIN." =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA DOBASHI VS. STEPHEN GOLDSTEIN et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH O1, 2007, LINE 10. DEFENDANT R. GOLDSTEIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THE CONVERSION CLAIM FAILS TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT HAD KNOWLEDGE OF OR AGREED TO THE THEFT OF THE JEWELRY. THE BREACH OF CONTRACT AND FRAUD CLAIMS FAIL TO ALLEGE DAMAGES AS A CONSEQUENCE OF THE ACT PLEAD. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM BURKE VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Respondents City And County Of San Francisco, City And County Of San Francisco Zoning Administrator, And City And County Of San Francisco Board Of Appeals' For Demurrer To Petition For Writ Of Mandate/Prohibition/Certification
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH O1, 2007, LINE 24. RESPONDENTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ZONING ADMINISTRATOR AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BOARD OF APPEALS' DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE CLAIM IS BARRED BY GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 65009. SEE HONIG V SAN FRANCISCO PLANNING DEPARTMENT (2005) 127 CAL. APP. 4TH 520. =(302/PJM)
